name: Den Chai Route 11/101 and rail gateway
capture_notes: Strategic road/rail gateway for Phrae. Den Chai district population is small, but Route 11/101 through-travel and Den Chai railway station create a stronger charging case than local population alone.

name: Phrae city / Route 101 retail-government core
capture_notes: Mueang Phrae has the largest population base in the province and Route 101 records the highest AADT points in current seed data. Best for city destination charging if parking and access are strong.

name: Route 101 Na Laem - Nong Ha high-AADT axis
capture_notes: Highest current Phrae AADT point is Route 101 Na Laem - Nong Ha at 19,509 AADT. Corridor supports north-south provincial flow.

name: Phrae bypass / Route 129
capture_notes: Phrae bypass has 10,921 AADT in seed data. Useful for roadside site screening around city edge and bypass traffic.

name: Sung Men - Long local corridor
capture_notes: Sung Men and Long add district demand south of Mueang Phrae. Better as local/district charging than high-throughput hub.

name: Song / Rong Kwang northern district corridor
capture_notes: Northern district demand and Route 101/1154 connectors. Demand likely moderate and site-quality dependent.

name: Wang Chin / Route 1125 south gateway
capture_notes: Southern district and hill-route gateway demand. More coverage/tourism oriented than utilization driven.
